mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamStareHstyDAO.listExamStareHsty 설 명 : 시험 참여 이력 조회 */ SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY A.STARE_HSTY_SN DESC) AS LINE_NO , A.STD_ID , B.USER_ID , C.USERNM , C.DEPTNM , D.USER_ID , A.HSTRY_TYCD , NVL((SELECT CDNM FROM TB_ORG_CODE WHERE CTGRCD = 'HSTRY_TYCD' AND CD = A.HSTRY_TYCD AND ROWNUM = 1), '미응시') AS HSTY_TYPE_NM , A.FRST_INQ_DTTM , A.CNTN_IP , A.REEXAMYN FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_HSTY A JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC_SBJCT B ON A.STD_ID = B.STD_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USR C ON B.USER_ID = C.USER_ID JOIN TB_LMS_USER_ACNT D ON C.USER_ID = D.USER_ID WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} AND A.HSTRY_TYCD != 'SET' AND A.DELYN = 'N'
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : ExamStareHstyDAO.insertExamStareHsty 설 명 : 시험 응시 이력 등록 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_HSTY ( STARE_HSTY_SN , STD_ID , EXAM_ID , ACQS_TOT_SCR , STARE_CNT , STARE_TM , SDTTM , EDTTM , ADDNDM_CTS , EVL_DTTM , EVLYN , REEXAMYN , DELYN , HSTRY_TYCD , CNTN_IP , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT (SELECT NVL(MAX(STARE_HSTY_SN), 0) + 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_HSTY H) , STD_ID , EXAM_ID , ACQS_TOT_SCR , STARE_CNT , STARE_TM , SDTTM , EDTTM , ADDNDM_CTS , EVL_DTTM , EVLYN , REEXAMYN , DELYN , #{hstyTypeCd} , #{connIp} , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND STD_ID = #{stdNo}

/* SQL ID : ExamStareHstyDAO.insertExamStareHstyBatch 설 명 : 시험 응시 이력 등록 일괄 */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_HSTY ( STARE_HSTY_SN , STD_ID , EXAM_ID , ACQS_TOT_SCR , STARE_CNT , STARE_TM , SDTTM , EDTTM , ADDNDM_CTS , EVL_DTTM , EVLYN , REEXAMYN , DELYN , HSTRY_TYCD , CNTN_IP , RGTR_ID , FRST_INQ_DTTM , MDFR_ID , MOD_DTTM ) SELECT (SELECT NVL(MAX(STARE_HSTY_SN), 0) + 1 FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_HSTY H) + ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY STD_ID) , STD_ID , EXAM_ID , ACQS_TOT_SCR , STARE_CNT , STARE_TM , SDTTM , EDTTM , ADDNDM_CTS , EVL_DTTM , EVLYN , REEXAMYN , DELYN , #{hstyTypeCd} , #{connIp} , #{rgtrId} , FN_DTTM() , #{mdfrId} , FN_DTTM() FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE WHERE EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND STD_ID IN
#{item}
mapper.select: /* SQL ID : ExamStareHstyDAO.selectLastStareTm 설 명 : 마지막 저장 시간으로 부터 현재 시간의 차이를 초로 조회 */ SELECT TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, STR_TO_DATE(A.FRST_INQ_DTTM, '%Y%m%d%H%i%s'), NOW()) AS stareTm FROM TB_LMS_EXAM_STARE_HSTY A WHERE A.EXAM_ID = #{examCd} AND A.STD_ID = #{stdNo} ORDER BY A.STARE_HSTY_SN DESC LIMIT 1
